---
title: "April_Final_R"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Data Preparation

```{r}
fam_file <- "/wynton/group/andrews/users/rakshyasharma/PRS/PRS-CS-Auto/resources/ADGC/adgc.fam"
covar_file <- "/wynton/group/andrews/data/adgc/ADGCdatasets/covar_covariates.tsv"
base_dir <- "/wynton/group/andrews/users/rakshyasharma/pgsc_calc/adgc/results"

folder_names <- c(
  "Day2018sociso",
  "Evangelou2018dbp",
  "Evangelou2018pp",
  "Howard2018dep",
  "Jansen2018insom",
  "Klimentidis2018mvpa",
  "Lee2018educ",
  "Liu2019drnkwk",
  "Niarchou2020fish",
  "Niarchou2020meat",
  "SanchezRoige2018auditc",
  "SanchezRoige2018auditp",
  "SanchezRoige2018auditt",
  "Willer2013hdl",
  "Willer2013ldl",
  "Willer2013tc",
  "Willer2013tg",
  "Xu2018diab",
  "Yengo2018bmi"
)
```


# Data Cleaning and merging

```{r}
 library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(broom)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

results_list <- list()

# Loop over each folder (trait)
for(fn in folder_names) {
  message("Processing folder: ", fn)
  
  # 1. File paths for this folder
  pca_file <- file.path(base_dir, fn, "adgc", "score", "adgc_popsimilarity.txt.gz")
  prs_file <- file.path(base_dir, fn, "adgc", "score", "adgc_pgs.txt.gz")
  
  # 2. Read in data
  fam_data <- read.table(fam_file, header = FALSE,
                         col.names = c("FID", "IID", "PID", "MID", "Sex", "P"))
  covar_data <- read.table(covar_file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
  pca_data <- read_tsv(pca_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  prs_data <- read.table(prs_file, header = TRUE)
  
  # 3. Basic cleaning
  fam_data <- fam_data %>% distinct(IID, .keep_all = TRUE)
  covar_data <- covar_data %>% distinct(ID_2, .keep_all = TRUE)
  pca_data <- pca_data %>% distinct(IID, .keep_all = TRUE)
  prs_data <- prs_data %>% distinct(IID, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  fam_data$IID <- sub("^0_", "", fam_data$IID)
  fam_data$IID <- ifelse(grepl("^[0]+[0-9]+$", fam_data$IID),
                         sub("^0+", "", fam_data$IID),
                         fam_data$IID)
  
  covar_data <- covar_data %>% mutate(ID_2 = as.character(ID_2))
  pca_data <- pca_data %>% mutate(IID = as.character(IID))
  prs_data <- prs_data %>% mutate(IID = as.character(IID))
  
  # 4. Merge the data
  merged_data <- covar_data %>%
    left_join(fam_data, by = c("ID_2" = "IID")) %>%
    left_join(prs_data, by = c("ID_2" = "IID")) %>%
    left_join(pca_data, by = c("ID_2" = "IID")) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    mutate(
      across(where(is.numeric), ~na_if(., -9)),
      status_binary = if_else(status == 2, 1, 0),
      status_binary = factor(status_binary, levels = c(0,1))
    ) %>%
    filter(status %in% c(1,2)) %>%
    drop_na(MostSimilarPop, aaoaae, apoe4any, sex, status)
  # 5. Fit sex-stratified logistic regressions
  # Define the model formula (using same predictors for both strata)
  formula <- status_binary ~ Z_norm2 + aaoaae + apoe4any + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4
  
  # Female model (Sex==2)
  merged_female <- merged_data %>% filter(Sex == 2)
  model_female <- glm(formula, data = merged_female, family = binomial())
  
  # Male model (Sex==1)
  merged_male <- merged_data %>% filter(Sex == 1)
  model_male <- glm(formula, data = merged_male, family = binomial())
  
  # 6. Manually compute Wald CIs for the Z_norm2 term
  zval <- qnorm(0.975)
  
  # Female results for Z_norm2
  tidy_female <- broom::tidy(model_female, conf.int = FALSE) %>% 
    filter(term == "Z_norm2") %>%
    mutate(folder = fn, sex_strata = "Female", estimate_or = exp(estimate))
  coefs_female <- summary(model_female)$coefficients
  if("Z_norm2" %in% rownames(coefs_female)) {
    ci_female <- data.frame(
      term = "Z_norm2",
      conf.low = coefs_female["Z_norm2", "Estimate"] - zval * coefs_female["Z_norm2", "Std. Error"],
      conf.high = coefs_female["Z_norm2", "Estimate"] + zval * coefs_female["Z_norm2", "Std. Error"]
    )
    tidy_female <- tidy_female %>%
      left_join(ci_female, by = "term") %>%
      mutate(
        conf.low_or = exp(conf.low),
        conf.high_or = exp(conf.high)
      )
  }

  # Male results for Z_norm2
  tidy_male <- broom::tidy(model_male, conf.int = FALSE) %>% 
    filter(term == "Z_norm2") %>%
    mutate(folder = fn, sex_strata = "Male", estimate_or = exp(estimate))
  coefs_male <- summary(model_male)$coefficients
  if("Z_norm2" %in% rownames(coefs_male)) {
    ci_male <- data.frame(
      term = "Z_norm2",
      conf.low = coefs_male["Z_norm2", "Estimate"] - zval * coefs_male["Z_norm2", "Std. Error"],
      conf.high = coefs_male["Z_norm2", "Estimate"] + zval * coefs_male["Z_norm2", "Std. Error"]
    )
    tidy_male <- tidy_male %>%
      left_join(ci_male, by = "term") %>%
      mutate(
        conf.low_or = exp(conf.low),
        conf.high_or = exp(conf.high)
      )
  }
  
  # 7. Combine female and male results for this folder
  folder_result <- bind_rows(tidy_female, tidy_male)
  results_list[[fn]] <- folder_result
}

# Combine results from all folders
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list)

# Peek at the final combined results
head(all_results)
```

## plot

```{r}

coefficient_plot <- ggplot(all_results, aes(
  x = reorder(folder, estimate_or), 
  y = estimate_or,
  ymin = conf.low_or,
  ymax = conf.high_or,
  color = sex_strata
)) +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "Yengo2018bmi"   = "BMI",
    "Day2018sociso"  = "Social Isolation",
    "Jansen2018insom" = "Insomnia",
    "Lee2018educ"    = "Education",
    "Evangelou2018dbp" = "Diastolic BP",
    "Evangelou2018pp" = "Pulse Pressure",
    "Howard2018dep" = "Depression",
    "Klimentidis2018mvpa" = "Physical Activity",
    "Liu2019drnkwk" = "Alchol Consumption",
    "Niarchou2020fish" = "Fish and plant related diet",
    "Niarchou2020meat" = "Meat related diet",
    "SanchezRoige2018auditc" = "AUDITC ",
    "SanchezRoige2018auditp" = "AUDITP",
    "SanchezRoige2018auditt" = "AUDITT",
    "Willer2013hdl" = "HDL Cholesterol",
    "Willer2013ldl" = "LDL Cholesterol",
    "Willer2013tc" = "Total Cholesterol",
    "Willer2013tg" = "Triglycerides",
    "Xu2018diab" = "Type 2 Diabetes"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Traits",
    y = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    caption = "Fig 1: Effect of PRS (Z_norm2) on AD Status by Sex",
    color = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    # Make axis texts and titles dark and clear
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    # Style the plot title with bold text
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "black", size = 16, face = "bold"),
    # Ensure the legend text is legible
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
  )

# Save the plot as a PNG file
ggsave("/wynton/group/andrews/users/rakshyasharma/pgsc_calc/adgc/results/coefficient_plot.png", coefficient_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)

```
## Table1
```{r}

library(tidyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)


table_1 <- merged_data%>%
  filter(!MostSimilarPop %in% c("CSA", "MID")) %>%
  select(MostSimilarPop, aaoaae, sex, status, apoe4any) %>%
  rename(
    age = aaoaae,
    Ancestry = MostSimilarPop,
    apoe = apoe4any
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c(1, 2), labels = c("Male", "Female")),
    status = factor(status, levels = c(1, 2), labels = c("Unaffected", "Affected"))
  )

table1_summary <- table_1 %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = sex,
    statistic = list(
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} / {N} ({p}%)"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  add_n()
table1_gt <- as_gt(table1_summary)
gtsave(table1_gt, filename = "/wynton/group/andrews/users/rakshyasharma/pgsc_calc/adgc/results/table1.html")
```

## More analysis

```{r}
library(tidyr)

# Add significance stars
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    signif = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    )
  )

# Compute OR difference (using the PRS term only) for each trait:
or_diff_df <- all_results %>%
  filter(term == "Z_norm2") %>%
  select(folder, sex_strata, estimate_or) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sex_strata, values_from = estimate_or) %>%
  mutate(or_diff = abs(Female - Male)) %>%
  arrange(desc(or_diff))

# Order traits by the difference magnitude
all_results$folder <- factor(all_results$folder, levels = or_diff_df$folder)

library(ggplot2)

forest_plot <- ggplot(all_results %>% filter(term == "Z_norm2"), aes(
  x = folder,
  y = estimate_or,
  ymin = conf.low_or,
  ymax = conf.high_or,
  color = sex_strata
)) +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = signif), position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), vjust = -1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "Traits (ordered by sex difference)",
    y = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    title = "Effect of PRS (Z_norm2) on AD Status by Sex",
    color = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

forest_plot
# Save the coefficient (forest) plot as a PNG file
ggsave("/wynton/group/andrews/users/rakshyasharma/pgsc_calc/adgc/results/coefficient_plot_pval.png", forest_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)



```
